title: ESC11: IF_ENFORCEENCRYPTICERTREQUEST
html:
Conditions: CA has IF_ENFORCEENCRYPTICERTREQUEST flag cleared (0x0), enabling NTLM relay to the ICertRequestD DCOM/RPC interface (not just HTTP). Similar to ESC8 but targets the RPC interface.

Check Flag

certutil -config "<ca-host>\<ca-name>" -getreg CA\InterfaceFlags
certutil -config "braavos.essos.local\ESSOS-CA" -getreg CA\InterfaceFlags

HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\...\InterfaceFlags REG_DWORD = 0x0 (0)

# 0x0 = VULNERABLE (no encryption required)
# 0x200 = Hardened

Note

Exploitation uses an adapted ntlmrelayx.py to relay NTLM auth to the CA's ICertRequestD DCOM interface over unencrypted RPC. The relay submits a crafted CSR on behalf of the relayed account.

Enable Flag (Remediation)

certutil -config "<ca-host>\<ca-name>" -setreg CA\InterfaceFlags +IF_ENFORCEENCRYPTICERTREQUEST
net stop certsvc && net start certsvc
excerpt: Conditions: CA has IF_ENFORCEENCRYPTICERTREQUEST flag cleared ( 0x0 ), enabling NTLM relay to the ICertRequestD DCOM/RPC interface (not just HTTP). Similar to ESC8 but targets the RPC interface. Check
